acceptance_criteria_review: Pass: grouped missing mark-scheme evidence is present in tests and the live audit report.
Pass: output-integrity pass/fail semantics were not weakened.
Pass: no canonical output or generated dataset was modified.
Pass with risk: source_companion remains missing for live groups when records lack source PDF metadata.
test_quality_review: The test extends an existing failure fixture and verifies a deterministic top-level report field. It proves grouping behavior without changing failure conditions. It also naturally guards counts after adding a second missing mark-scheme record.
repo_hygiene_review: The change is limited to audit reporting and tests. Generated live audit output is contained in .agent-runs/2026-06-18T22-15-18-167Z/iteration-04/.
scope_creep_review: No output repair, companion relabeling, extraction, or rendering changes were made. The iteration is report-only but directly improves a failing gate's repairability.
regression_risks: The new field may grow large when many missing records exist, but it is bounded by grouped paper count rather than all records.
source_companion=missing limits usefulness until paper-based fallback inference is added.
commands_run: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_audit.py -q (before implementation; failed as expected)

.venv/bin/python -m exam_bank.cli output-integrity-audit --input output/json/question_bank.json --artifact-root output --output .agent-runs/2026-06-18T22-15-18-167Z/iteration-04/audit.current.integrity.json (exit 1 as expected)
evidence: The live audit report groups 74 unexpected missing mark-scheme records across 17 paper groups.
All live groups currently report source_companion=missing, exposing the next bounded improvement.
recommended_next_planner_focus: Infer source companion keys from canonical paper IDs when source_pdf metadata is absent, so missing mark-scheme groups can identify likely syllabus/year/session/component companions.
